subject: [PATCH v8 15/15] Documentation/userfaultfd: document RWP working set tracking

2026-07-03.patch_summary: This patch adds documentation to the Linux kernel's userfaultfd feature, specifically covering read-write protection (RWP) working set tracking. It explains how RWP works, including its fault models and semantics, as well as the typical workflow for a virtual machine (VMM) to track working sets. The documentation also covers the UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP ioctl command, which enables RWP on a memory range, and provides examples of how it can be used.
